# pangolin_site_resource_user (Resource)

Assigns a user to a Pangolin private site resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pangolin_site_resource_user" "example" {
  site_resource_id = pangolin_site_resource.example.id
  user_id          = pangolin_user.example.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `site_resource_id` (Number) The ID of the private site resource.
- `user_id` (String) The ID of the user to assign.
